ddls:
CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein */,
  "protein_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the protein */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Amino acid sequence of the protein */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the protein sequence */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the protein (e.g., experimental, predicted) */,
  "structure" TEXT /* 3D structure of the protein in PDB format */,
  "function" TEXT /* Biological function of the protein */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the protein */,
  "isoelectric_point" REAL /* Isoelectric point of the protein */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the protein record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the protein record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein associated with the experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the experiment */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used in the experiment */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the experiment was conducted */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Start date and time of the experiment */,
  "ended_at" TEXT /* End date and time of the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  "experimental_method_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the experimental method used */,
  "sample_preparation" TEXT /* Sample preparation method */,
  "instrument_settings" TEXT /* Instrument settings used during the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amino_acids" (
  "amino_acid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amino acid in a protein */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein the amino acid belongs to */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the amino acid in the protein sequence */,
  "amino_acid" TEXT /* Amino acid residue */,
  "dssp" INTEGER /* DSSP (secondary structure) value */,
  "sasa" REAL /* Solvent-accessible surface area (SASA) value */,
  "gyrate" REAL /* Radius of gyration (GYRATE) value */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy value */,
  "rmsf" REAL /* Root mean square fluctuation (RMSF) value */,
  "charge" REAL /* Charge of the amino acid at a given pH */,
  "hydrophobicity" REAL /* Hydrophobicity of the amino acid */,
  "polarity" REAL /* Polarity of the amino acid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amino_acid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amino_acids_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the data is from */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., DSSP, SASA, GYRATE, ENERGY, RMSF) */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the data */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the data value */,
  "data_quality" REAL /* Quality of the experimental data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the experimental data */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who uploaded the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein being accessed */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_frequency" INTEGER /* Number of times a protein or experiment is accessed */,
  "data_downloaded" INTEGER /* Whether data was downloaded during the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein the metadata is for */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., reference, description) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "ec_number" TEXT /* EC number of the protein */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Gene associated with the protein */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_metadata_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the feature (e.g., domain, motif) */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the feature in the protein sequence */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the feature in the protein sequence */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the feature */,
  "evidence" TEXT /* Evidence supporting the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_features_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "protein1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first protein in the interaction */,
  "protein2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second protein in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the interaction (e.g., binding, regulation) */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to determine the interaction */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the interaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction */,
  "interaction_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the interaction */,
  "interaction_evidence" TEXT /* Evidence supporting the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_interactions_protein2_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein2_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_interactions_protein1_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein1_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein the publication is related to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal of the publication */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations for the publication */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_publications_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)
